name: Post Comments
description: Threaded comments under a post. A sort-by control sits on the left, jump-to-latest on the right, then a vertical stream of comments with replies indented on a soft surface. A persistent compose bar pins the bottom — not a bottom sheet — for one-thumb reading and quick reply.

top.note: Same chrome as [[post]] for flow consistency — page variant with back chevron and trailing toolbar cluster.

controls.note: Sort + jump row. Leading `button/text` is the sort menu trigger (label 'By time' with chevron); trailing `button/text` 'Jump to latest' in accent blue. A 'Load earlier comments…' `button/text` sits below this row before the comment list.

items.title: Nesting works for design tokens too
items.body: Worth checking the resolved bundle — light/dark parity is the proof.

items.title: Agreed on the parity check
items.body: Caught one drift in radius.lg — opened an issue.

body.note: Comment stream as `feed` items. Nested replies use a `sys.color.surfaceContainerLow` block (preserve surface treatment — not a left rule). Footer row carries time · heart count · reply · DM · overflow; 'reply' and 'DM' are two distinct text actions, not a combined dropdown.

bottom.note: Persistent compose bar — pinned bottom above keyboard / safe area. Do NOT model as `bottom-sheet`; it stays docked even when scrolling.

rules: Nested replies use a soft surface block (`sys.color.surfaceContainerLow`), not a left rule.
Footer 'reply' and 'DM' are two separate `button/text` actions; do not collapse into one dropdown.
Demo strings render English per AGENTS.md rule 7.
